tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: She's been feeling a bit under the _______ since Monday. I think she's got a cold.
Every _______ has a silver lining — something good can come out of any bad situation.
He saved money for a _______ day, so he wasn't worried when his car broke down.
The politician weathered the _______ of criticism and came out stronger than before.
After months of arguments, the two friends finally _______ the air and made up.
It's raining _______ and dogs out there — you'd better take an umbrella!
